no: In-game buff automation via EEex Lua. Adds a menu and innate abilities to trigger configurable buff sequences with preset support. Requires EEex (v0.10.0+). Alpha release.

dependencies.reason: BuffBot requires EEex to be installed — uses EEex Lua scripting and LuaJIT.

sum: Automates pre-combat buff sequences via configurable innate abilities. Supports presets and per-class spell lists. Requires EEex.

co.no: Installs Lua scripts (M_BfBot, BfBotCor, BfBotCls, BfBotScn, BfBotExe, BfBotPer, BfBotInn, BfBotUI, BfBotTst), BuffBot.menu, visual assets (parchment UI, icons), 5 innate ability tooltips, and bfbot_presets directory. Requires EEex cn:0 or cn:1.
Patches InfinityLoader.ini to enable LuaJIT (LuaPatchMode=REPLACE_INTERNAL_WITH_EXTERNAL). Auto-skips if LuaJIT already active. Requires EEex LuaJIT files at EEex/loader/LuaJIT/.
